entities.name: Vibe Architect
entities.context: Role in build workspace, creates plans, design gatekeeper

entities.name: Vibe Builder
entities.context: Role in build workspace, executes plans

entities.name: Vibe Debugger
entities.context: Role in build workspace, validates builds

entities.name: Vibe Level Upper
entities.context: Role in build workspace, quality coach for major work

entities.name: Vibe Operator
entities.context: Role in build workspace, routes tracks state

relationships.context: Both roles are involved in the build workspace process
Both roles contribute to the overall build quality
Builder executes plans which are validated by the Debugger
Both are involved in ensuring quality in the build process
Operator routes to the Builder, facilitating the build process
